message:
feat(cap): IoCap trait implementations for browser entropy, time, and host API capabilities

Wire the three new browser capability subsystems into the IoCap trait
hierarchy with authorize() logic and trait-object downcasting:

BrowserEntropyIoCap (EntropyIoCap + IoCap):
- Source allowlist check, operation allowlist check, fill byte limit
- IoCap::entropy_cap() returns Some(self), name="browser-entropy"
- deterministic_fallback_enabled() exposes test seam

BrowserTimeIoCap (TimeIoCap + IoCap):
- Source allowlist check, operation allowlist check
- Monotonic enforcement: when require_monotonic is set, only
  PerformanceNow and DeterministicVirtual pass source check
- Duration floor/ceiling enforcement for Sleep and Interval ops
- IoCap::time_cap() returns Some(self), name="browser-time"

BrowserHostApiIoCap (HostApiIoCap + IoCap):
- Surface allowlist check, degraded-mode denial unless explicitly allowed
- IoCap::host_api_cap() returns Some(self), name="browser-host-api"
- require_redaction_safe_diagnostics() for telemetry safety

Unit tests validate default-deny, oversized fills, monotonic escalation
denial, duration bounds, degraded-mode denial, and IoCap trait-object
integration for each capability.

Security invariant tests add browser_authority_capsules_security module
confirming all three capabilities maintain deny-all default posture and
enforce explicit grant semantics at the trait-object boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
